DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-10-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
James B. Kraus (415-956-8100) of Zacks, Freedman & Patterson for Plaintiff/opposing party Danger Panda LLC.
Stephen L. Collier (415-771-9850) of Tenderloin Housing Clinic for Defendants/moving party Donn Maiava Launiu and Olga A. Launiu.
Court reporter: Jennifer Moser Roux CSR #11033 (707-477-9599).
(as fully reported in the reporter's notes)

The Court announces its tentative ruling. Defendant ARGUED on general demurrer. Both sides give interpretations of Civil Code 3334. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANTs DONN LAUNIU and OLGA LAUNIU's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Taken Under Submission. Both sides to exchange proposed orders and submit in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: S. Le, Court reporter: Jennifer Moser Roux CSR #11033 (707-477-9599) (as fully reported in the reporter's notes). (D501)
